message:
feat(fp-frame): add str.split expand n parameter parity (frankenpandas-2gyf)

Adds StrAccessor::split_df_n matching pandas 2.2
Series.str.split(pat, n=..., expand=True). n=None keeps unlimited-split
behavior (current split_df, which now delegates). n=Some(k) uses Rust's
splitn(k+1, pat) to cap at k splits → k+1 parts, mirroring pandas.
n=0 yields the full string in a single column.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
